overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a moonlit dirt path through rural countryside. The scene features stone walls, scattered trees, and distant village buildings under a large full moon with atmospheric blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural dirt path under full moon with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving through open countryside toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large bright full moon illuminating the night sky
winding dirt trail with grass edges and wheel ruts
low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
scattered deciduous trees silhouetted against the night sky
sparse trees and bushes on the right side of the path
dark mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the moon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt path illuminated by a large full moon. The landscape features scattered trees on both sides and distant mountains on the horizon, with a stone wall beginning to appear on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding country path flanked by stone walls approaching village

events.description: distant village buildings with lit windows become visible ahead on the path
moon shifts to center sky as path curves, altering shadow patterns on the ground

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as stone walls enclose both sides and a village comes into view ahead

entered.detail: stone wall appearing on the right side of the path matching the left wall
cluster of medieval-style buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path winds through a more enclosed area with stone walls now lining both sides. Distant village buildings become visible ahead as the moon shifts position. The vegetation grows denser and closer to the path edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed village approach with dense foliage pressing close to trail

events.description: path becomes more enclosed with dense vegetation and stone walls creating a corridor effect

agents.ego_description: walking toward the village through an enclosed section of the path with stone walls and dense bushes on both sides

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching the village through a narrow, enclosed path. Stone walls continue to line the route while dense vegetation presses in from both sides. The village buildings draw noticeably closer and the moon remains visible through the trees on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit rural path that gradually transforms from an open landscape into a narrow, enclosed approach to a village. It begins with Geralt walking down an open dirt road under a large full moon, with scattered trees and distant mountains framing the horizon. As the path winds forward, the environment becomes more confined as stone walls rise on both sides and the surrounding vegetation grows denser. The scene then shifts toward the village buildings appearing ahead, with the moon shifting position in the sky as the route tightens. Finally, the camera follows Geralt through a narrow corridor of stone and thick foliage, drawing closer to the village structures while the moon remains visible through the overhanging trees.
